creator: bsdports@wayfair.com
text:
Py-carbon 0.9.9.

esarmiento@wayfair.com / bsdports@wayfair.com will be maintainer. Works on 8.2-REL and 8.2-STABLE built using Tinderbox and deployed to production systems.

Fix: (cd /usr/ports/databases && patch -p0 < py-carbon.diff.txt)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: There is no databases/py-carbon in the ports tree.
